programme.title: Cops: Cops Dishonest Dudes
programme.desc: Torrential rain hampers the pursuit of a fleeing vehicle, a man on a moped is carrying more than he lets on, and a persistent police officer unravels a sketchy man's story.

programme.title: Cops: Cops Fighting to Lose
programme.desc: Shots fired in a park after hours leads to a messy situation for one officer, and a disturbed man with a gun takes responding officers on a harrowing chase.

programme.title: Cops: Cops Mom Still Loves You
programme.desc: Officers track down a suspect who eluded them earlier, a suspicious vehicle takes off at the sight of police, and a man gets busted for possession in front of his mom.

programme.title: Cops: Cops The Young and the Reckless
programme.desc: Police catch up to a man with warrants and a history of resisting arrest, a fidgety driver arouses suspicion, and a minor with beers in his pants has to answer to his mom.

programme.title: Cops: Cops Too Many Cooks
programme.desc: A fleeing driver becomes cooperative once he reaches his destination, a woman gets feisty with police, and police respond to a domestic dispute involving a frying pan.

programme.title: Cops: Cops Second Time Around
programme.desc: Deputies are led on a chase by a driver they pursued just weeks earlier, and a man caught with drugs tries to pin the blame on his girlfriend.

programme.title: Cops: Cops Party in a Box
programme.desc: Officers review dashcam footage after a suspect claims force was used against him unjustly, and a weed enthusiast drops some knowledge on police about the founding fathers.

programme.title: Cops: Cops Two in the Bush
programme.desc: A woman leads police on a dangerous chase, a driver is remorseful for the damage he's caused, and a man's denial of solicitation is undermined by his open fly.

programme.title: Cops: Cops Undeniably Fishy
programme.desc: A man loses his friend and finds trouble, officers stop a vehicle they believe was involved in a shooting, and a suspicious vehicle leads to a suspicious story.

programme.title: Cops: Cops Nothing to See Here
programme.desc: A man's mole gives him away when he tries to fool police with a fake name, a drunken man shows officers he has nothing to hide, and a reckless driver imperils a neighborhood.

programme.title: Cops: Cops Bible Buddies
programme.desc: Numerous patrol cars give chase to a man on a dirt bike refusing to yield, and an alleged armed robber is upfront about his reasons for running from police when approached.

programme.title: Cops: Cops Shaking Like a Paint Mixer
programme.desc: A man blames the weed found in his car on his absent nephew, a suspect in custody starts to convulse, and police respond to a call about an armed man tripping on bath salts.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H: Episode 11
programme.desc: The Governor introduces a volleyball program to let the inmates work off their tension.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H: Episode 12
programme.desc: Karen talks Franky down from the roof and offers to teach her how to read.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H: Episode 13
programme.desc: As news of an escape spreads, Vera attempts to tighten security.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H: Episode 14
programme.desc: The payroll robbery goes disastrously wrong. Lynn goes into labour.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H: Episode 15
programme.desc: Doreen and Franky masquerade as nuns to con people into giving them money.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H: Episode 16
programme.desc: Meg and Karen find Lynn on the floor of her cell, bleeding.

programme.title: Cops: Cops Shaking Like a Paint Mixer
programme.desc: A man blames the weed found in his car on his absent nephew, a suspect in custody starts to convulse, and police respond to a call about an armed man tripping on bath salts.

programme.title: Cops: Cops Love Gone Bad
programme.desc: A man on a dirt bike tries to elude police while dumping his firearm, and after breaking up a parking lot drug deal, an officer advises a young suspect to make better choices.

programme.title: Cops: Cops Crying Over Spilled Milk
programme.desc: After chasing down a suspect on foot, officers retrieve a fully loaded revolver from his pants, and police respond to a call about a man wielding a knife outside a bar.

programme.title: Cops: Cops Front Door Felony
programme.desc: A fleeing motorcyclist tries to outsmart officers by hiding his bike in a retail garden area, and a concerned citizen reports seeing a man steal a package from a porch.

programme.title: Cops: Cops What's in the Box
programme.desc: A jaywalking citation escalates to resisting arrest, an SUV contains more needles than one officer is willing to deal with, and a lovers' spat draws the attention of a patrol.

programme.title: Cops: Cops Trouble in Paradise
programme.desc: A man refusing to drop his knife tests an officer's patience, neighbors hold an alleged thief until police arrive, and a couple of volatile newlyweds need police intervention.

programme.title: Cops: Cops Carjacked Up
programme.desc: Officers spot a suspect running down the street with a knife, the driver of a stolen car takes off on foot after he's pulled over, and police find carjacked vehicles.

programme.title: Cops: Cops No Helmet, No Ride
programme.desc: A man resisting arrest draws a crowd, an armed robbery suspect takes a walk down felony lane with an officer he recognizes, and a strange scene unfolds at a DUI checkpoint.

programme.title: Cops: Cops Sidewalk Licker
programme.desc: A prostitution sting in Las Vegas nets more than just johns, police respond to reports of a woman licking the sidewalk, and a patrol happens on a lovers' row in a parking lot.

programme.title: Cops: Cops From Sixty to Zero
programme.desc: A motorcyclist fleeing police slams into a pickup truck at high speed, and a man being frisked invents an interesting story to explain the suspicious bulge in his pants.

programme.title: Cops: Cops First Time Caller
programme.desc: A fleet-footed deputy nabs a suspect on the run, officers responding to a domestic call are refused entry, and police try to ascertain the cause of a woman's hallucinations.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H: Episode 16
programme.desc: Meg and Karen find Lynn on the floor of her cell, bleeding.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H: Episode 17
programme.desc: Lynn is rushed to hospital after her suicide attempt.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H: Episode 18
programme.desc: Barbara has drugs smuggled into the prison.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H: Episode 19
programme.desc: Bea is furious to learn from Vera that Barbara is inside for smuggling drugs.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H: Episode 20
programme.desc: Franky talks Doreen into robbing a hardware store but the hold-up goes wrong.

programme.title: Cops: Cops First Time Caller
programme.desc: A fleet-footed deputy nabs a suspect on the run, officers responding to a domestic call are refused entry, and police try to ascertain the cause of a woman's hallucinations.

programme.title: Cops: Cops Kicking and Screaming
programme.desc: An intoxicated man suspected of domestic abuse refuses to obey deputies' orders, police find drugs in a woman's car, and an alleged prostitute encounters the police.

programme.title: Cops: Cops Mixed Emotions
programme.desc: A traffic stop escalates to a dangerous situation, a woman admits to hitting her dad in the face with her teeth, and a defiant driver doesn't want deputies to search his car.

programme.title: Cops: Cops Better Safe Than Sorry
programme.desc: Officers try to calm an agitated and disoriented man before he hurts himself or someone else, and a driver going 2 MPH on a highway catches the attention of a patrol car.

programme.title: Cops: Cops Funny Money
programme.desc: Cops pursue a man skipping bail, an impaired driver is surprisingly cooperative, and officers struggle to remove a violent offender from a crime scene.

programme.title: Cops: Cops Pants Down, Hit the Ground
programme.desc: A man learns a hard lesson about wearing his seatbelt, and police perform a traffic stop and uncover a sad man with a strange story.

programme.title: Cops: Cops British Invasion
programme.desc: A desperate trespasser attempts to give the cops the slip, and a frightened man tries to get the attention of deputies but takes the wrong approach.

programme.title: Cops: Cops One, Two, Tree
programme.desc: A high-speed pursuit ends abruptly when the suspect makes a wrong turn, and a nervous man attempts to hide his crime when he thinks no one can see him.

programme.title: Cops: Cops Wake Up Call
programme.desc: A lawbreaker tries to convince the cops that he's a good guy, and deputies smell trouble during a traffic stop.

programme.title: Cops: Cops Just Hanging Out
programme.desc: A jumpy bicyclist mistakenly reveals more than he had planned, and officers search a darkened building in an attempt to thwart a robbery in progress.

programme.title: Cops: Cops Bail Me Out, Boss
programme.desc: A distressed woman leads the cops to her abusive fiance, and a couple of officers are suspicious when they pull over an overly friendly man.

programme.title: Cops: Cops Thanks for Nothing, Mom
programme.desc: Officers respond to a suspected animal cruelty call, a fight between neighbors turns violent, and deputies question a suspicious group behind a truck stop.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H: Episode 20
programme.desc: Franky talks Doreen into robbing a hardware store but the hold-up goes wrong.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H: Episode 21
programme.desc: Doreen starts behaving like a Franky clone, and Lizzie hears from her brother.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H: Episode 22
programme.desc: Barbara's hearing manages to cast doubt on her aunt's impartiality, thanks to Vera.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H: Episode 23
programme.desc: Doreen bullies Barbara, who barricades herself in her cell.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H: Episode 24
programme.desc: Doreen tries to apologise to Barbara, and Karen's retrial drags up painful memories.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H: Episode 25
programme.desc: Karen's appeal seems to be going badly, and Lynn gets into trouble at work.

programme.title: Cops: Cops Thanks for Nothing, Mom
programme.desc: Officers respond to a suspected animal cruelty call, a fight between neighbors turns violent, and deputies question a suspicious group behind a truck stop.

programme.title: Cops: Cops Clueless
programme.desc: A young woman with warrants tries to avoid jail time, deputies confront a hit-and-run suspect, and a routine traffic stop ends with an arrest.

programme.title: Cops: Cops Organized Crime
programme.desc: Emotions run high when a dispute between siblings gets out of hand, a man struggles to keep his story straight with the police, and deputies investigate a domestic incident.

programme.title: Cops: Cops Out of Sight, Out of Mind
programme.desc: The K-9 unit tracks down a man fleeing on foot, a father is left with no choice but to call the cops on his son, and a former gang member is found with a stolen firearm.

programme.title: Cops: Cops Two Doors Down
programme.desc: A deputy calls for backup when he's outnumbered, a former Marine damages his neighbors' property, and a husband and wife are separated after their vehicle is searched.

programme.title: Cops: Cops One Headlight
programme.desc: A man pulls out all the stops to elude the police, a civilian steps in when she spots a violent crime in progress, and a suspected shoplifter is confronted by officers.

programme.title: Cops: Cops Between a Bush and a Hard Place
programme.desc: A high-speed pursuit switches gears when the driver flees on foot, an altercation causes tension between neighbors, and a driver is irate when officers search his passenger.

programme.title: Cops: Cops Manic Monday
programme.desc: A wanted man attempts to hide at his grandmother's house, police arrest a suspect driving a stolen vehicle, and officers call animal control for an injured dog.

programme.title: Cops: Cops Gun in the Front, Rifle in the Back
programme.desc: Deputies pull a man from a devastating car wreck after a high-speed chase, officers apprehend and question a robbery suspect, and a wanted man tries to flee from police.

programme.title: Cops: Cops Heat of the Moment
programme.desc: A parolee leads deputies on a high-speed chase, police respond to a domestic disturbance call, and an officer helps frustrated citizens settle their differences.

programme.title: Cops: Cops Cookies and Contraband
programme.desc: A detective is injured after chasing a man driving a stolen car, a bar fight ends with a couple in handcuffs, and an officer finds a variety of items during a vehicle search.

programme.title: Cops: Cops Odd Man Out
programme.desc: An alleged lawbreaker can't seem to grasp the gravity of her situation, and officers question a colorful trio of suspects.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H: Episode 25
programme.desc: Karen's appeal seems to be going badly, and Lynn gets into trouble at work.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H: Episode 26
programme.desc: The shoplifter's identity is revealed, and her story immediately makes an impression.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H: Episode 27
programme.desc: Susan's husband sues for custody of their children, and Vera learns about George.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H: Episode 28
programme.desc: Lizzie and Doreen hatch a plan that involves breaking into the governor's office.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H: Episode 29
programme.desc: A shocking incident on a daytime TV show leads to a return to prison for one woman.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H: Episode 30
programme.desc: Lizzie makes a grim discovery in the laundry. Monica makes a bid to take over as Top Dog.

programme.title: Cops: Cops Odd Man Out
programme.desc: An alleged lawbreaker can't seem to grasp the gravity of her situation, and officers question a colorful trio of suspects.

programme.title: Cops: Cops Bikini Brawl
programme.desc: Officers are called when a mother's job hunt takes a turn for the worse, and deputies confront a nervous man with a lot of bad habits.

programme.title: Cops: Cops A Man Without a Plan
programme.desc: A young man receives a wake-up call when police catch him breaking the law, and officers play peacemakers after a board game sparks a family feud.

programme.title: Cops: Cops The Truth Is Key
programme.desc: A desperate suspect flees from the cops after shots are fired, and a father and daughter are caught off-guard when they run into a man wielding a screwdriver.

programme.title: Cops: Cops Mother Knows Best
programme.desc: A defiant motorist is shocked when his mother sides with the law, and deputies discover a man wearing a bizarre costume during a routine traffic stop.

programme.title: Cops: Cops The Naked Truth
programme.desc: An evasive driver blames his girlfriend for his behavior, a pregnant woman makes some questionable choices, and a robbery suspect finds comfort in coming clean.

programme.title: Cops: Cops Rock Star
programme.desc: Officers intervene when a dispute between neighbors gets heated, suspects of a shooting lead police on a high-speed pursuit, and a domestic argument gets out of hand.

programme.title: Cops: Cops Window of Opportunity
programme.desc: Officers apprehend an armed suspect, the cops are called when a man damages his neighbor's window, and deputies investigate a parking garage known for illegal activity.

programme.title: Cops: Cops Mommy's Tears
programme.desc: A suspect collides with another driver while fleeing from police, deputies mediate an altercation over a bag of chips, and officers respond to a domestic dispute.

programme.title: Cops: Cops Running Scared
programme.desc: Suspected jewelry thieves attempt a daring escape during a pursuit, a man gives officers a challenge during his arrest, and a traffic stop puts a marriage in jeopardy.

programme.title: Cops: Ignorance is an Excuse
programme.desc: Two men engage in a fist fight on the street over an alleged robbery. A couple claim that they didn't know the car they are driving was stolen.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H: Episode 30
programme.desc: Lizzie makes a grim discovery in the laundry. Monica makes a bid to take over as Top Dog.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H: Episode 31
programme.desc: When Bea learns she will be going back to Wentworth soon, she escapes from the hospital.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H: Episode 32
programme.desc: Meg is suspicious when she finds a pack of Bea's cigarettes.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H: Episode 33
programme.desc: Bea returns to Mum's flat, furious over Judith-Anne lying to her. Val calls the police.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H: Episode 34
programme.desc: Lizzie tells Doreen she intends to try to get back in Monica's favour.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H: Episode 35
programme.desc: The home brew causes friction among the women. Clara gets permission to have a party.

programme.title: Cops: Ignorance is an Excuse
programme.desc: Two men engage in a fist fight on the street over an alleged robbery. A couple claim that they didn't know the car they are driving was stolen.

programme.title: Cops: Checked Luggage
programme.desc: Agents of the US Customs and Border Protection pursue a vehicle. Border agents spot two undocumented people. Airport Customs detains a man when agents suspect he might be carrying more than luggage.

programme.title: Cops: Uncomfortable Shoes
programme.desc: A driver takes police on a neighborhood chase. Officers are called to capture a 12-foot python hiding outside a home. Officers suspect a motorist with a funny walk is hiding something up his shoe.

programme.title: Cops: In-Law Problems
programme.desc: US Marshals are tasked with finding a young boy that has been kidnapped for ransom. A man suspected of dealing contraband is turned in by his ex-girlfriends mother.

programme.title: Cops: Set Some Boundaries
programme.desc: A couple gets into a fight with their in-laws when they attempt to take their baby on a 3am drive. A man is attacked by his roommate after he gets 'too friendly' with a woman in the home.

programme.title: Cops: Invisible Intruders
programme.desc: A homeowner shoots at intruders only he can see. The driver of a stolen truck claims he's just trying to return the vehicle.. A argument about parenting styles turns ugly when a gun is pulled.

programme.title: Cops: Dance Fighting
programme.desc: A dispute inside a nightclub turns into a street fight. A man patrols his neighborhood 'Old West' style. A K-9 unit is called in to track a burglar on the run.

programme.title: Cops: Do Not Disturb
programme.desc: A prostitute tries to outrun the police during a foot chase. A man claims he can only meet women at motels since he lives with his mom.

programme.title: Cops: Tree Hugging
programme.desc: An ex-felon threatens to kill his spouse after she announces she want to divorce him. A driver has suspicious plants in her car. A woman crashes her friends truck into a pedestrian and a tree.

programme.title: Cops: Crawling to Vegas
programme.desc: A driver leads police on a slow speed chase towards Las Vegas. Three people are suspected of using contraband. A multi-neighbor dispute devolves into a fight involving guns and bats.

programme.title: Cops: First Do No Harm
programme.desc: A suicidal man tries to taunt police into shooting him. Undercover officers bust up an illegal operation at a pain management clinic. A woman claims she's just a bystander to a motorcycle hit and run.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H: Episode 35
programme.desc: The home brew causes friction among the women. Clara gets permission to have a party.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H: Episode 36
programme.desc: The police turn up at Val's place and arrest Bea, returning her to Wentworth.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H: Episode 37
programme.desc: Meg and Greg are nervous around each other after spending the night together.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H: Episode 38
programme.desc: Erica cancels all privileges, and tightens security following the garden party.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H: Episode 39
programme.desc: Clara cements her popularity with the women by getting Monica to leave Irene alone.

programme.title: Cops: First Do No Harm
programme.desc: A suicidal man tries to taunt police into shooting him. Undercover officers bust up an illegal operation at a pain management clinic. A woman claims she's just a bystander to a motorcycle hit and run.

programme.title: Cops: Safe Cracking
programme.desc: A man stages a sit-in in his car in an attempt to stop it from being towed. A homeowner denies that he's selling drugs despite the large amount of evidence found in his home.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: no info available

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H: Episode 39
programme.desc: Clara cements her popularity with the women by getting Monica to leave Irene alone.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H: Episode 40
programme.desc: Monica becomes disruptive when her parole is turned down.

programme.title: Prisoner: Cell Block H
programme.desc: no info available
